name: Archify
description_en: Generate clean architecture diagrams with light and dark themes from any agent.
description_zh: 在任意智能体中生成简洁的架构图,支持浅色与深色主题。
long_en: A skill that produces architecture and system diagrams, helping document a codebase's structure directly from a conversation.
long_zh: 生成架构与系统图的技能,可直接在对话中帮你记录代码库结构。
sec_note_en: Generates local diagram files; no elevated access required.
sec_note_zh: 生成本地图表文件;无需提权访问。
